title: Insolvency practitioner sanctions: Jamie Playford 29 November 2024 1
body: "Summary of complaint: This Order is made in relation to a complaint that Jamie Playford, in his role as Liquidator of four companies, between 21 June 2022 and 13 January 2023, failed to act in accordance with the Fundamental Principle of Professional Competence and Due Care as set out in the Insolvency Code of Ethics (applicable from 1 May 2020) by failing to ensure the Statement of Affairs complied with the requirements of Rule 6.4 of the Insolvency (England & Wales) 2016 Rules in one or more of the proposed Creditors’ Voluntary Liquidations.  Accordingly, Jamie Playford was found to be liable to disciplinary action under Disciplinary Bye-law 4.1b (effective between 14 October 2019 and 31 May 2023). "
